build.buildCommand: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/edtech run typecheck && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/edtech run build

deploy.startCommand: pnpm --filter @workspace/db run push && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run start:prod
